reviews.review_msg: He gave such interesting examples that would easily stick in your mind when it came time for a test. He also taught our tutorial and although I already knew his lectures were engaging, I found out in there how funny he was too.

Easily one of the best teachers I have had in my entire academic career. He has such passion for his work and it really came out in his lectures. Im sad that I wont be able to take another class with him again since hes retired.

No doubt he is a brilliant prof, but he is supremely tough on his exams and the people giving him good ratings must be his devoted TAs or lovers that came out of the closet. He teaches a very good life lesson, but getting a good grade requires you to get out of that "norm". Brilliant prof, bad marking scheme.

Intelligence and enthusiastic prof with a high status in his field. Open to critiques and always there to help. Although course materials is intense with challenging exams requiring lots of efforts, in my 4 yrs in university this is the only course that i can remember all the materials well even after a year without any rehearsal. Thanks, Bruce!

His writing is illegible!
 He speaks well and that's really all you can go on.
 
 He talks about a lot of useless things that are not even on the exam. He goes beyond the class requirement, which is usually a good thing but he does it in such a manner that the material confuses you even more.
 
 His exams are difficult. You must read the questions

If you learn best by the usual: textbook, power point type lecture DO NOT take this prof. No textbook, but you MUST pay close attention in lectures because the material is heavy.. he is brilliant in his field obviously, but the stuff is challenging.. he will NOT coddle you, you must demand help and he will happily give it to you!

I'm sure there is a correlation between negativity of remarks here and grade received in the class.  Dr. Whittlesea is one of the most brilliant profs I've had!  Extremely interesting material which can be used for studying all other subjects, excellent clarity in lectures, and great focus on understanding, not merely memorizing.

He lectures well but his writing is terrible. We spent  much time on things not important and no time on the important, exam staff. The exams are level 300, very difficult. He gives scenarios that u have to read few times to understand. Also, he focused on areas that are studied in another class. I would not take another class with him.

I take back the nice comment and smiley face I gave earlier.  I walked into the final with an A, totally confident in my preparation.  Walked out totally sure I had nailed it.  Got 55%! :(  DO NOT TAKE THIS COURSE!!!
horrible lectres. he has very messy writing and isnt able to properly communicate ideas.stay away.unfair marking scheme of exams, but TA is helpful
